text: Snowflake provides a mechanism for its customers to override its natural clustering algorithms. This method is:
Which of the following are valid Snowflake Virtual Warehouse Scaling Policies? (Choose two.)
True or False: A single database can exist in more than one Snowflake account.
Which of the following roles is recommended to be used to create and manage users and roles?
True or False: Bulk unloading of data from Snowflake supports the use of a SELECT statement.
Select the different types of Internal Stages: (Choose three.)
True or False: A customer using SnowSQL / native connectors will be unable to also use the Snowflake Web Interface (UI) unless access to the Ul is explicitly granted by support.
Account-level storage usage can be monitored via:

options.a: The Snowflake Web Interface (UI) in the Databases section
options.b: The Snowflake Web Interface (UI) in the Account -> Billing & Usage section
options.d: The Account Usage Schema -> ACCOUNT_USAGE_METRICS View

text: Credit Consumption by the Compute Layer (Virtual Warehouses) is based on: (Choose two.)
Which statement best describes clustering?

options.a: Clustering represents the way data is grouped together and stored within Snowflake's micro-partitions
options.b: The database administrator must define the clustering methodology for each Snowflake table
options.c: The clustering key must be included on the COPY command when loading data into Snowflake
options.d: Clustering can be disabled within a Snowflake account

text: True or False: The COPY command must specify a File Format in order to execute.
Which of the following commands sets the Virtual Warehouse for a session?
Which of the following objects can be cloned? (Choose four.)
Which object allows you to limit the number of credits consumed within a Snowflake account?
Snowflake is designed for which type of workloads? (Choose two.)
What are the three layers that make up Snowflake's architecture? (Choose three.)
Why would a customer size a Virtual Warehouse from an X-Small to a Medium?

options.d: To accommodate a more complex workload

text: True or False: Reader Accounts incur no additional Compute costs to the Data Provider since they are simply reading the shared data without making changes.
Which of the following connectors allow Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) authorization when connecting? (Choose all that apply.)
True or False: Snowflake charges a premium for storing semi-structured data.
Which of the following statements describes a benefit of Snowflake's separation of compute and storage? (Choose all that apply.)

options.a: Growth of storage and compute are tightly coupled together
options.b: Storage expands without the requirement to add more compute
options.c: Compute can be scaled up or down without the requirement to add more storage
options.d: Multiple compute clusters can access stored data without contention

text: True or False: It is possible to unload structured data to semi-structured formats such as JSON and Parquet.
In which layer of its architecture does Snowflake store its metadata statistics?
True or False: Data in fail-safe can be deleted by a user or the Snowflake team before it expires.
True or False: Snowflake's data warehouse was built from the ground up for the cloud in lieu of using an existing database or a platform, like Hadoop, as a base.
Which of the following statements are true of Virtual Warehouses? (Choose all that apply.)

options.a: Customers can change the size of the Warehouse after creation
options.b: A Warehouse can be resized while running
options.c: A Warehouse can be configured to suspend after a period of inactivity
options.d: A Warehouse can be configured to auto-resume when new queries are submitted

text: The PUT command: (Choose two.)

options.a: Automatically creates a File Format object
options.b: Automatically uses the last Stage created

options.a: The Pipe load history is reset to empty
options.b: The REFRESH parameter is set to TRUE
options.c: Previously loaded files will be ignored
